languages.text: "Мико-о-ош..." {n}Он стонет свое имя, но взгляд тут же становится обескураженным — он уже забыл его вновь.{/n} "Ползатель-наладчик... Мы — л-легкие судна! Как кораблю... дышать, если слизнеплесень... не счистить с лопастей? Смерть не повод не трудиться! Помочь... дышать..."

"Miiikosh..." {n}He speaks his name in a drawn-out groan, but then confusion immediately clouds his gaze — he seems to have forgotten it again.{/n} "A vent crawler... We're the l-lungs of the ship! How can the ship... breathe if there's no one to pick the mouldslime... off the blades? Death's no excuse for idleness! I need to help them... breathe..."
languages.original_text: "Мико-о-ош..." {n}Он стонет свое имя, но взгляд тут же становится обескураженным — он уже забыл его вновь.{/n} "Ползатель-наладчик... Мы — л-легкие судна! Как кораблю... дышать, если слизнеплесень... не счистить с лопастей? Смерть не повод не трудиться! Помочь... дышать..."

How can the ship... breathe if there's no one to pick the mouldslime... off the blades? Death's no excuse for idleness! I need to help them... breathe..."

How can the ship... breathe if there's no one to pick the mouldslime... off the blades? Death's no excuse for idleness! I need to help them... breathe..."

languages.text: 「ミコシュ…私は…換気口の掃除をする人。おふくろは、私たちが船の肺だと言っていた。換気口の羽根のポリプを掃除する人がいないと、船は息をできない。そう、私は船の呼吸を助ける必要がある…」
languages.original_text: "Mikosh... I'm... a vent crawler. Mam used to say we're the lungs of the ship. How can the ship breathe if there's no one to pick the polyps off the blades? Yeah, I need to help them breathe..."

traits.locale_text: 「ミコシュ…私は…換気口の掃除をする人。マムは、私たちが船の肺だと言っていた。換気口の羽根のポリプを掃除する人がいないと、船は息をできない。そう、私は船の呼吸を助ける必要がある…」

languages.text: “米——科什……”{n}他拖长声音喊出自己的名字，但困惑很快再次蒙上他的目光——他似乎又忘记了。{/n}“是爬通风管的……我们是船上的肺！要是没人去清理扇叶上的……霉泥，舰船还怎么……呼吸？死了也不能偷懒！我得帮它们……呼吸……”
languages.original_text: "Miiikosh..." {n}He speaks his name in a drawn-out groan, but then confusion immediately clouds his gaze — he seems to have forgotten it again.{/n} "A vent crawler... We're the l-lungs of the ship! How can the ship... breathe if there's no one to pick the mouldslime... off the blades? Death's no excuse for idleness! I need to help them... breathe..."

traits.locale_text: “米——科什……”{n}他拖长声音喊出自己的名字，但困惑很快再次蒙上他的目光——他似乎又忘记了。{/n}“是爬通风管的……我们是船上的肺！要是没人去清理扇叶上的……霉泥，舰船还怎么……呼吸？死了也不能偷懒！我得帮它们……呼吸……”

languages.text: « Miiikosh... » {n}Il prononce son nom dans un long grognement, puis la confusion revient lui embrumer le regard : il semble l'avoir de nouveau oublié.{/n} « Je suis un nettoyeur de ventilation. Nous sommes les p-poumons du vaisseau ! Comment est-ce que le vaisseau peut respirer s'il n'y a personne pour enlever les moisissures qui se collent sur les pales ? La mort n'est pas une excuse pour tirer au flanc ! Je dois l'aider... à respirer... »
languages.original_text: "Miiikosh..." {n}He speaks his name in a drawn-out groan, but then confusion immediately clouds his gaze — he seems to have forgotten it again.{/n} "A vent crawler... We're the l-lungs of the ship! How can the ship... breathe if there's no one to pick the mouldslime... off the blades? Death's no excuse for idleness! I need to help them... breathe..."

traits.locale_text: « Miiikosh... » {n}Il prononce son nom dans un long grognement, puis la confusion revient lui embrumer le regard : il semble l'avoir de nouveau oublié.{/n} « Je suis un nettoyeur de ventilation. Nous sommes les p-poumons du vaisseau ! Comment est-ce que le vaisseau peut respirer s'il n'y a personne pour enlever les moisissures qui se collent sur les pales ? La mort n'est pas une excuse pour tirer au flanc ! Je dois l'aider... à respirer... »

languages.text: «Miiikosh...». {n}Pronuncia su nombre con un gemido, y acto seguido la confusión nubla su mente y parece volver a olvidarlo.{/n} «Un reptador... ¡Somos los pu... pulmones de la nave! ¿Cómo va a respirar... la nave si nadie retira el limo mohoso... de los ventiladores? ¡La muerte no excusa la inactividad! Debo ayudar... a que respire...».
languages.original_text: "Miiikosh..." {n}He speaks his name in a drawn-out groan, but then confusion immediately clouds his gaze — he seems to have forgotten it again.{/n} "A vent crawler... We're the l-lungs of the ship! How can the ship... breathe if there's no one to pick the mouldslime... off the blades? Death's no excuse for idleness! I need to help them... breathe..."

traits.locale_text: «Miiikosh...». {n}Pronuncia su nombre con un gemido, y acto seguido la confusión nubla su mente y parece volver a olvidarlo.{/n} «Un reptador... ¡Somos los pu... pulmones de la nave! ¿Cómo va a respirar... la nave si nadie retira el limo mohoso... de los ventiladores? ¡La muerte no excusa la inactividad! Debo ayudar... a que respire...».

languages.text: "Miiikosh..." {n}Adını uzun, iniltili bir şekilde söylüyor ancak sonra bakışları anında bulanıklaşıyor. Görünüşe göre adını yine unutmuş.{/n} "Havalandırma sakini... Biz geminin ak... Akciğerleriyiz! Küf balçığını pervanelerden... Temizleyecek kimse yoksa gemi nasıl... Nefes alabilir? Ölüm, tembelliğe bahane olamaz! Nefes almalarına... Yardım etmeliyim..."
languages.original_text: "Miiikosh..." {n}He speaks his name in a drawn-out groan, but then confusion immediately clouds his gaze — he seems to have forgotten it again.{/n} "A vent crawler... We're the l-lungs of the ship! How can the ship... breathe if there's no one to pick the mouldslime... off the blades? Death's no excuse for idleness! I need to help them... breathe..."

traits.locale_text: "Miiikosh..." {n}Adını uzun, iniltili bir şekilde söylüyor ancak sonra bakışları anında bulanıklaşıyor. Görünüşe göre adını yine unutmuş.{/n} "Havalandırma sakini... Biz geminin ak... Akciğerleriyiz! Küf balçığını pervanelerden... Temizleyecek kimse yoksa gemi nasıl... Nefes alabilir? Ölüm, tembelliğe bahane olamaz! Nefes almalarına... Yardım etmeliyim..."

languages.text: "Miiikosh ..." {n}Er sagt seinen Namen mit einem gedehnten Stöhnen, ehe Verwirrung seines Verstand trübt ... er scheint ihn schon wieder vergessen zu haben.{/n} "Ein Schachtkriecher ... Wir sind die L-lunge des Schiffs! Wie kann das Schiff atmen, wenn niemand den Schimmelschleim von den Lamellen entfernt? Der Tod ist keine Entschuldigung für Untätigkeit! Ich muss ihnen beim ... Atmen helfen ..."
languages.original_text: "Miiikosh..." {n}He speaks his name in a drawn-out groan, but then confusion immediately clouds his gaze — he seems to have forgotten it again.{/n} "A vent crawler... We're the l-lungs of the ship! How can the ship... breathe if there's no one to pick the mouldslime... off the blades? Death's no excuse for idleness! I need to help them... breathe..."

Wir sind die L-lunge des Schiffs! Wie kann das Schiff atmen, wenn niemand den Schimmelschleim von den Lamellen entfernt? Der Tod ist keine Entschuldigung für Untätigkeit! Ich muss ihnen beim ... Atmen helfen ..."
